description_long: This is a tall, rectangular shelving unit constructed from light-colored wood, featuring four open shelves with no doors or backing on the front and rear. The vertical side panels extend the full height of the unit, providing structural support and a clean, modern appearance. Each shelf is evenly spaced, allowing for the storage or display of books, decorative items, or other objects. The back and sides of the shelves are open, making the contents easily accessible from multiple angles. The wood grain is visible throughout, giving the piece a natural and warm aesthetic. The overall design is minimalist, with no visible hardware, handles, or decorative embellishments.
description: A tall, light wood shelving unit with four open shelves and a minimalist, modern design. The structure is open on the front and back, with visible wood grain and no doors or handles.
description_view_0: Front view showing four open shelves and the full height of the shelving unit, with all compartments clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the depth of the shelves and the solid vertical side panel, with partial visibility of the shelf interiors.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the open back of the unit, mirroring the front with visible shelf surfaces and no backing.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the other vertical side panel and shelf depth.
